sections.title: Information We Collect
sections.content: We collect information you provide directly to us, such as when you create an account, subscribe to our VPN service, or contact us for support. This may include your name, email address, payment information, and device information.

sections.title: How We Use Your Information
sections.content: We use the information we collect to provide, maintain, and improve our VPN services, to process your transactions, to send you technical notices and support messages, and to respond to your comments and questions.

sections.title: Data Security
sections.content: We implement appropriate technical and organizational measures to protect your personal information against unauthorized access, alteration, disclosure, or destruction.

sections.title: Third-Party Services
sections.content: We may use third-party services for payment processing, analytics, and customer support. These services have their own privacy policies governing the use of your information.

sections.title: Your Rights
sections.content: You have the right to access, correct, or delete your personal information. You may also object to or restrict certain processing of your data.

sections.title: Contact Us
sections.content: If you have questions about this Privacy Policy, please contact us at: privacy@yourvpn.com
